_description: Single-topic taxonomy for global tech and AI hotspots. Subtopics win over top-level categories when classification is precise.

topics.label: AI Frontier / AI 前沿
topics.description: 模型、智能体、AI 应用、AI 实验室动态与前沿技术突破。

google_queries: "AI model" OR OpenAI OR Anthropic OR Gemini OR Claude
"AI agent" OR "agentic AI" OR assistant OR copilot OR automation
大模型 OR 智能体 OR 模型发布 OR 推理能力
multimodal OR reasoning OR benchmark OR "AI application"
twitter_queries: (OpenAI OR Anthropic OR Gemini OR Claude) (model OR release OR API OR benchmark)
("AI agent" OR "agentic AI" OR assistant OR copilot) (workflow OR coding OR automation OR product)
(reasoning OR multimodal OR benchmark OR evaluation) (model OR lab OR capability OR release)
reddit_queries: (OpenAI OR Anthropic OR Gemini OR Claude) AND (model OR release OR API OR benchmark)
("AI agent" OR "agentic AI" OR assistant OR copilot) AND (workflow OR coding OR automation OR product)
(reasoning OR multimodal OR benchmark OR evaluation) AND (model OR lab OR capability OR release)
("AI application" OR assistant OR copilot OR chatbot) AND (launch OR release OR capability OR adoption)

topics.label: AI Infra / AI 基础设施
topics.description: 芯片、内存、电力、数据中心、算力、机器人、智能驾驶、Tesla、SpaceX 与太空算力。

google_queries: NVIDIA OR AMD OR TSMC OR semiconductor OR GPU
"data center" OR datacenter OR compute OR power OR cooling
芯片 OR 算力 OR 数据中心 OR 机器人
robotics OR humanoid OR self-driving OR space technology
twitter_queries: (NVIDIA OR AMD OR TSMC OR semiconductor OR GPU) (chip OR fab OR supply OR demand)
("data center" OR datacenter OR power OR cooling) (AI OR cluster OR capacity OR expansion)
(robotics OR humanoid OR self-driving OR space technology) (deployment OR launch OR factory OR vehicle)
reddit_queries: (NVIDIA OR AMD OR TSMC OR semiconductor) AND (chip OR GPU OR inference OR supply)
("data center" OR datacenter OR power OR cooling OR compute) AND (AI OR cluster OR capacity OR demand)
(robotics OR humanoid OR autonomy OR self-driving OR space) AND (deployment OR factory OR vehicle OR mission)
(semiconductor OR GPU OR datacenter OR robotics) AND (capacity OR deployment OR supply chain OR energy)

topics.label: GitHub / 开源动态
topics.description: 开源项目、代码仓库、开发者生态与技术趋势。

topics.label: Technology / 科技
topics.description: 消费电子、计算机硬件、软件工程、互联网服务、通信技术、数字产品与科技生态。

google_queries: "consumer tech" OR smartphone OR laptop OR wearable OR gadget
"internet service" OR app OR "digital product" OR social media OR "open source"
消费电子 OR 数码产品 OR 互联网服务 OR 科技产品
telecom OR broadband OR handset OR electronics OR device launch
twitter_queries: (smartphone OR laptop OR wearable OR gadget) (launch OR review OR update OR release)
("internet service" OR app OR "digital product" OR social media) (launch OR update OR users OR feature)
(telecom OR broadband OR handset OR electronics) (market OR launch OR service OR device)
reddit_queries: (smartphone OR laptop OR tablet OR wearable OR gadget) AND (launch OR review OR update OR feature)
("internet service" OR app OR "digital product" OR "social media" OR "open source") AND (launch OR update OR feature OR users)
(telecom OR handset OR broadband OR electronics) AND (market OR launch OR service OR device)
title:(smartphone OR laptop OR gadget OR device) AND (launch OR review OR update OR feature)

topics.label: Business / 商业
topics.description: 公司动态、市场趋势、投融资、财报、产业政策与商业竞争。

google_queries: earnings OR revenue OR guidance OR results
funding OR acquisition OR merger OR IPO OR valuation
财报 OR 融资 OR 并购 OR 产业政策
antitrust OR regulation OR investigation OR competition
twitter_queries: (earnings OR revenue OR guidance OR results) (company OR market OR shares OR sector)
(funding OR acquisition OR merger OR IPO) (startup OR company OR industry OR market)
(antitrust OR regulation OR investigation OR competition) (company OR industry OR market OR policy)
reddit_queries: (earnings OR revenue OR guidance OR results) AND (company OR market OR shares OR sector)
(funding OR acquisition OR merger OR IPO) AND (startup OR company OR market OR industry)
(antitrust OR regulation OR investigation OR policy) AND (company OR industry OR market OR competition)
title:(layoffs OR IPO OR acquisition OR earnings) AND (company OR market OR industry OR business)

topics.label: World / 国际
topics.description: 国际事务、地缘政治、外交关系、全球贸易与供应链。

google_queries: war OR conflict OR diplomacy OR sanctions
"foreign policy" OR geopolitics OR "global trade" OR tariffs
国际关系 OR 地缘政治 OR 制裁 OR 关税
"supply chain" OR "export controls" OR ceasefire OR trade route
twitter_queries: (war OR conflict OR diplomacy OR sanctions) (country OR region OR border OR ceasefire)
("foreign policy" OR geopolitics OR tariffs OR "global trade") (China OR US OR Europe OR Middle East)
("supply chain" OR "export controls" OR shipping OR energy) (trade OR conflict OR route OR market)
reddit_queries: (war OR conflict OR diplomacy OR sanctions) AND (country OR region OR border OR ceasefire)
("foreign policy" OR geopolitics OR tariffs OR "global trade") AND (China OR US OR Europe OR Middle East)
("supply chain" OR "export controls" OR shipping OR energy) AND (trade OR conflict OR route OR market)
(international relations OR geopolitics OR sanctions OR tariffs) AND (diplomacy OR conflict OR trade OR supply chain)

topics.label: Science / 科学
topics.description: 基础研究、学术论文、实验室成果、科学发现与工程突破。

google_queries: "research paper" OR preprint OR study OR paper
breakthrough OR discovery OR laboratory OR experiment
科研 OR 论文 OR 实验室 OR 科学发现
benchmark OR dataset OR replication OR "peer review"
twitter_queries: ("research paper" OR preprint OR study OR paper) (research OR experiment OR results OR journal)
(breakthrough OR discovery OR laboratory OR experiment) (research OR science OR study OR team)
(benchmark OR dataset OR replication OR "peer review") (paper OR results OR finding OR study)
reddit_queries: ("research paper" OR preprint OR arXiv OR study) AND (research OR science OR experiment OR results)
(breakthrough OR discovery OR laboratory OR experiment) AND (research OR science OR study OR team)
(benchmark OR dataset OR replication OR "peer review") AND (paper OR study OR results OR finding)
(science OR research OR paper OR experiment) AND (discovery OR dataset OR results OR laboratory)

topics.label: Social / 社会
topics.description: 社会事件、大众媒体、舆论热点、公共议题与社会现象。

google_queries: "public opinion" OR viral OR trending OR backlash
"social issue" OR society OR privacy OR misinformation
社会事件 OR 舆论热点 OR 公共议题 OR 社会现象
"social media" OR moderation OR harassment OR "online culture"
twitter_queries: ("public opinion" OR viral OR trending OR backlash) (social media OR internet OR culture OR app)
("social issue" OR privacy OR misinformation OR moderation) (platform OR society OR internet OR community)
("social media" OR harassment OR boycott OR protest) (platform OR app OR culture OR users)
reddit_queries: ("public opinion" OR viral OR trending OR backlash) AND (social media OR internet OR culture OR app)
("social issue" OR privacy OR misinformation OR moderation) AND (platform OR society OR internet OR community)
("social media" OR harassment OR boycott OR protest) AND (platform OR app OR culture OR users)
(social issue OR public opinion OR online culture OR privacy) AND (platform OR internet OR community OR users)
